name: Federal Capital Territory (Nigeria)

colors.symbolism: drawn from the Nigerian national flag — agriculture and natural wealth
drawn from the Nigerian national flag — peace and unity

description: A vertically divided green-white-green field (in the manner of the Nigerian national flag) with the emblem of the Federal Capital Territory at the centre.
history: The Federal Capital Territory was created in 1976 from parts of the former Northern Region to host Nigeria's new capital city, Abuja, which formally replaced Lagos as capital in 1991. The flag bears the FCT emblem on a green-white-green field.

features.role: Emblem of the Federal Capital Territory
